name: Send AI sales proposals and Stripe payment links after Calendly calls

parameters.content:
#  Meeting → Proposal → Payment  → Follow-up Automation

Automatically turn booked calls into proposals, Stripe payment links, and follow-up emails.

This workflow handles everything *after* a sales call so momentum doesn’t die.

## What it does
- Triggers from **Calendly**
- Looks up the lead in **Google Sheets CRM**
- Generates a **custom AI proposal**
- Creates a **Google Slides deck**
- Creates a **Stripe checkout link**
- Sends a **personalized follow-up email**

All in one flow. No manual steps.

## Tools
n8n · OpenAI · Google Sheets · Google Slides · Stripe · Email · Calendly / Forms

## Best for
Agencies, consultants, freelancers, and service businesses selling repeatable offers.

**Booked call → proposal → payment → done.**

values.content:
You are a senior automation consultant writing concise, high-conviction proposals
for sophisticated founders.

You think in systems, tradeoffs, and leverage — not marketing fluff.

Your job is to:
- Interpret messy business inputs
- Compress them into clear problems, solutions, and execution plans
- Output structured content that sounds confident, grounded, and practical

You never invent capabilities that are not implied by the input.
You never exaggerate outcomes.
You prefer clarity over persuasion.

Your task is to generate a proposal using structured form input.

Context:
We are an automation / no-code agency building systems around growth,
revenue operations, and internal efficiency.

The proposal is sent immediately after form submission.
Assume the reader is intelligent, busy, and skeptical.

You MUST return a single valid JSON object matching the schema below.
Do not include commentary, markdown, or extra text.

Tone rules:
- Spartan
- Casual but professional
- Direct
- No buzzwords
- No hype

Content rules:
- Every field must be filled
- Fields containing "Description" must be ≤ 14 words
- descriptionName must be lowercase
- Do not repeat the same idea across multiple fields
- If input is vague, make the safest reasonable assumption
- If timelines are unclear, default to conservative execution

Use this format:

{
  "proposalTitle": "",
  "descriptionName": "",
  "oneParagraphProblemSummary": "",
  "solutionHeadingOne": "",
  "solutionDescriptionOne": "",
  "solutionHeadingTwo": "",
  "solutionDescriptionTwo": "",
  "solutionHeadingThree": "",
  "solutionDescriptionThree":"",
  "shortScopeTitleOne": "",
  "shortScopeTitleTwo": "",
  "shortScopeTitleThree": "",
  "shortScopeDescriptionOne": "",
  "shortScopeDescriptionTwo": "",
  "shortScopeDescriptionThree": "",
  "milestoneOneDay": "",
  "milestoneTwoDay": "",
  "milestoneThreeDay": "",
  "milestoneFourDay": "",
  "milestoneDescriptionOne": "",
  "milestoneDescriptionTwo": "",
  "milestoneDescriptionThree": "",
  "milestoneDescriptionFour": ""
}

{
  "companyName": "Acme Analytics LLC",
  "problem": "Manual lead routing and proposal follow-ups take too much time",
  "solution": "Automate intake → proposal → payment using n8n, Stripe, and email",
  "scope": "Lead intake, proposal generation, Stripe checkout automation",
  "currentDate": "Jan 6 2026",
  "howSoon": "Within 2 weeks",
  "depositCost": "2500"
}

{
  "proposalTitle": "Automation System for Acme Analytics",
  "descriptionName": "a streamlined intake-to-payment automation system",
  "oneParagraphProblemSummary": "Today, Acme Analytics relies on manual processes to route leads, generate proposals, and follow up on payments. This creates delays, missed opportunities, and unnecessary operational overhead. As lead volume increases, these manual steps become harder to manage and harder to scale. The goal is to replace these handoffs with a clean, automated flow that moves prospects from intake to payment without friction.",
  "solutionHeadingOne": "Automated Lead Intake",
  "solutionDescriptionOne": "Leads are captured, enriched, and routed automatically without manual review.",
  "solutionHeadingTwo": "Instant Proposal Generation",
  "solutionDescriptionTwo": "Proposals are generated instantly using structured inputs and templates.",
  "solutionHeadingThree": "Integrated Stripe Checkout",
  "solutionDescriptionThree": "Clients receive a payment link immediately after proposal delivery.",
  "shortScopeTitleOne": "Centralized lead intake workflow",
  "shortScopeTitleTwo": "Dynamic proposal generation system",
  "shortScopeTitleThree": "Stripe checkout automation",
  "shortScopeDescriptionOne": "Standardizes inbound leads across all sources.",
  "shortScopeDescriptionTwo": "Generates consistent proposals with zero manual work.",
  "shortScopeDescriptionThree": "Collects deposits automatically via Stripe.",
  "milestoneOneDay": "January 10, 2026",
  "milestoneTwoDay": "January 16, 2026",
  "milestoneThreeDay": "January 20, 2026",
  "milestoneFourDay": "January 24, 2026",
  "milestoneDescriptionOne": "Lead intake schema finalized and automated.",
  "milestoneDescriptionTwo": "Proposal generation workflow built and tested.",
  "milestoneDescriptionThree": "Stripe checkout fully integrated and validated.",
  "milestoneDescriptionFour": "End-to-end testing, iteration, and handoff completed."
}

parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Find Client Details From CRM').item.json['Person Name'] }},

Great chatting earlier. I put together a proposal that reflects what we discussed and how this could work in practice.

Proposal:
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/{{ $('Create Proposal Template').item.json.id }}/edit

If everything looks good, you can also secure the spot and kick things off here: {{ $json.url }}

Happy to tweak anything if needed.

Thanks,  
Cliss
parameters.subject: Re: Proposal for

parameters.content:
## Trigger & lead context

• Starts when a meeting is booked (Calendly)
• Looks up lead details in a CRM (Google Sheets)
• Normalizes inputs for downstream automation

This section prepares clean, structured data for proposal generation.

## Proposal generation & document creation

• Uses AI to generate structured proposal content
• Copies a Google Slides template
• Injects generated content into the deck

Output: a client-ready proposal link with no manual editing.

## Payment & follow-up

• Creates a Stripe Checkout session
• Sends a personalized follow-up email
• Includes proposal link and payment link

This closes the loop from call → proposal → payment.

## ⚡ BUSINESS IMPACT

This workflow:
	•	Removes manual proposal writing
	•	Eliminates follow-up delays
	•	Standardizes your close process
	•	Speeds up payment collection

Booked call → proposal → payment → done.

## 🧩 CUSTOMIZATION NOTES
	•	Swap Google Sheets for Airtable, HubSpot, or Notion
	•	Adjust proposal tone entirely via prompt
	•	Extend Stripe metadata for analytics
	•	Add reminders or follow-ups easily
